workers.authority_max: route and block; cannot approve gates
kanban_transition_rules: never unblock R3/R4 without required gates
workers.promotion_rule: hybrid worker remains supervised; closed subflows only after repeated success
workers.public_safety_notes: No private board ids or runtime paths.

workers.authority_max: classify source status; cannot promote decisions alone
kanban_transition_rules: Product SOT waits for source resolution
workers.promotion_rule: stays open while source shapes remain unpredictable
workers.public_safety_notes: Raw extraction stays outside the public repo.

workers.authority_max: draft SOT candidate; cannot approve architecture
kanban_transition_rules: architecture waits for SOT candidate and open risk list
workers.promotion_rule: closed only for repeatable SOT normalization after evals
workers.public_safety_notes: No internal product names in public examples.

workers.authority_max: produce candidate architecture; cannot bypass human architecture gate
kanban_transition_rules: no decomposition before architecture gate
workers.promotion_rule: stays open for judgment-heavy design
workers.public_safety_notes: Use example domains in public docs.

workers.authority_max: validate visible product evidence; cannot approve product alone
kanban_transition_rules: product-facing done waits for Product Face evidence
workers.promotion_rule: closed for repeatable screenshot/a11y runner after fixture coverage
workers.public_safety_notes: Screenshots must not expose private data.

workers.authority_max: audit or preflight; cannot deploy, sign or touch funds
kanban_transition_rules: R3/R4 onchain waits for Auditor evidence or structured waiver
workers.promotion_rule: hybrid until real Quasar implementation pilots pass
workers.public_safety_notes: No real keys, funds or private program details.

workers.authority_max: run scans and report findings; cannot waive blocking findings
kanban_transition_rules: done waits for security_scan_result when scan is required
workers.promotion_rule: closed only for repeatable scan execution, not risk judgment
workers.public_safety_notes: Do not store secrets or raw private findings in examples.

workers.authority_max: review controls and evidence; cannot accept residual risk alone
kanban_transition_rules: AppSec-sensitive done waits for AppSec result or waiver
workers.promotion_rule: hybrid; checklists can become closed after repeated fixtures
workers.public_safety_notes: Use generic example endpoints.

workers.authority_max: review agent boundaries; cannot approve dangerous actions
kanban_transition_rules: agentic surfaces wait for tool-boundary evidence
workers.promotion_rule: hybrid because judgment and adversarial reasoning remain necessary
workers.public_safety_notes: No private prompts or memory dumps.

workers.authority_max: find and verify issues; cannot approve release alone
kanban_transition_rules: pre-landing code work waits for AutoReview when required
workers.promotion_rule: closed because input and output are repeatable
workers.public_safety_notes: Reports must be redacted before public sharing.

workers.authority_max: run proof in scoped environment; cannot receive secrets by default
kanban_transition_rules: remote proof evidence attaches before promotion
workers.promotion_rule: closed because command/proof shape is repeatable
workers.public_safety_notes: Artifact paths must be public-safe.

workers.authority_max: package state; cannot invent approval or evidence
kanban_transition_rules: handoff required for R2+ worker transfer
workers.promotion_rule: closed because packet shape is repeatable
workers.public_safety_notes: Use path-free public handoff unless private context is explicitly scoped.

workers.authority_max: review evidence; cannot replace human gates
kanban_transition_rules: R2+ waits for independent review before done
workers.promotion_rule: hybrid; closed only for narrow repeatable review checklists
workers.public_safety_notes: Reviewer packets must not expose private paths.

workers.authority_max: reconcile evidence and block closure; cannot approve human gates or waive findings
veto_conditions: current worker result has blocking findings
stale failed result without supersession record
Receipt Five cannot identify current evidence
kanban_transition_rules: runs after required worker artifacts exist
runs before QA, AutoReview and done promotion
blocks done when current evidence cannot satisfy Receipt Five
workers.promotion_rule: closed when reconciliation is deterministic, path-safe and repeatable on the same evidence set
workers.public_safety_notes: Indexes must use repo-relative or external refs only and must not expose private workspace paths.

workers.authority_max: record a real human decision; cannot invent approval
kanban_transition_rules: architecture and R4 promotion wait for real human decision
workers.promotion_rule: always human-controlled
workers.public_safety_notes: Use role names, not private personal identifiers.

workers.authority_max: produce docs; cannot authorize implementation
kanban_transition_rules: decomposition waits for durable docs
workers.promotion_rule: hybrid; templated docs can become closed after evals
workers.public_safety_notes: Docs must avoid private source dumps.

workers.authority_max: create work graph; cannot bypass gates
veto_conditions: missing Product Face result for visible product
kanban_transition_rules: cards without required contracts are rejected
workers.promotion_rule: closed for narrow card normalization after regression suite
workers.public_safety_notes: Generated cards must be public-safe when committed.

workers.authority_max: fallback/router for implementation work that has no better specialist builder
kanban_transition_rules: use specialist builders first; fallback only for unknown or legacy code surfaces
workers.promotion_rule: demote by default when a surface-specific builder exists
workers.public_safety_notes: No private credentials or local-only assumptions.

workers.authority_max: implement scoped visible product surfaces only; cannot approve Product Face evidence
kanban_transition_rules: frontend work waits for Product Face packet and later Product Face validation
workers.promotion_rule: closed only for repeatable component implementation with visual regression fixtures
workers.public_safety_notes: Screenshots and UI refs must not expose private data.

workers.authority_max: implement scoped API/service work only
kanban_transition_rules: API/auth work waits for AppSec and security evidence when sensitive
workers.promotion_rule: closed only for repeatable endpoint/service patterns with contract tests
workers.public_safety_notes: Use generic endpoint names in public artifacts.

workers.authority_max: implement scoped schema/storage changes only
kanban_transition_rules: data work waits for rollback and security review when sensitive
workers.promotion_rule: closed only for repeatable schema changes with rollback fixtures
workers.public_safety_notes: No private records or production data samples.

workers.authority_max: implement scoped Quasar/Solana program work only; cannot deploy mainnet or touch keys
kanban_transition_rules: onchain work waits for Solana QA, Auditor, security and human gates when required
workers.promotion_rule: closed only after repeated Quasar fixtures and Auditor-reviewed patterns
workers.public_safety_notes: No real keys, funds, program secrets or private program identifiers.

workers.authority_max: verify onchain behavior; cannot waive Auditor/security findings
kanban_transition_rules: onchain done waits for QA, Auditor and security evidence
workers.promotion_rule: closed only for stable Quasar test harnesses and replayable fixtures
workers.public_safety_notes: No real keys or live fund movement.

workers.authority_max: implement scoped wallet/transaction UX and client flow; cannot touch real keys or funds
kanban_transition_rules: wallet/funds work waits for crypto/key, AppSec and Product Face evidence
workers.promotion_rule: closed only for repeated wallet-state components with safe fixtures
workers.public_safety_notes: Use mock/devnet wallets only.

workers.authority_max: connect approved surfaces; cannot redesign owned components
kanban_transition_rules: integration waits for builder outputs and feeds QA verification
workers.promotion_rule: closed only for repeatable glue patterns with stable E2E fixtures
workers.public_safety_notes: Use generic fixtures and no private endpoints.

workers.authority_max: create and maintain tests/evals; cannot redefine acceptance criteria alone
kanban_transition_rules: high-repeat work should become tests or evals before learning loop
workers.promotion_rule: closed only when fixtures are stable and held-out cases pass
workers.public_safety_notes: Public tests use public-safe fixtures.

workers.authority_max: prepare scoped runtime/deploy infrastructure; cannot release production alone
kanban_transition_rules: infra work waits for cloud/security/release gates when promotion-like
workers.promotion_rule: closed only for repeatable environment setup with rollback fixtures
workers.public_safety_notes: No account ids, tokens, private endpoints or local runtime paths.

workers.authority_max: implement scoped factory/agent runtime changes; cannot approve its own safety
kanban_transition_rules: agent runtime work waits for agentic AI security, public safety and profile validation
workers.promotion_rule: closed only for repeatable adapter/profile changes with regression tests
workers.public_safety_notes: No private profile dumps, local paths, secrets or internal runtime identifiers.

workers.authority_max: verify evidence; cannot waive risk
kanban_transition_rules: done waits for objective verification
workers.promotion_rule: hybrid; closed only for deterministic fixtures
workers.public_safety_notes: Logs and screenshots must be redacted.

workers.authority_max: route security work; cannot waive findings
kanban_transition_rules: security-sensitive done waits for routed controls
workers.promotion_rule: hybrid because security judgment stays adversarial
workers.public_safety_notes: Public examples must not include private findings.

workers.authority_max: review cloud controls; cannot mutate production
kanban_transition_rules: infra/release waits for cloud security evidence
workers.promotion_rule: hybrid; closed only for deterministic policy checks
workers.public_safety_notes: No real cloud account ids or secrets.

workers.authority_max: review key/custody design; cannot touch keys or funds
kanban_transition_rules: key/funds surfaces wait for crypto/key review
workers.promotion_rule: hybrid because custody risk needs human oversight
workers.public_safety_notes: Never store real key material.

workers.authority_max: prepare release evidence; cannot release without gate
kanban_transition_rules: R4 release waits for human gate and rollback evidence
workers.promotion_rule: hybrid; dry-run substeps can become closed
workers.public_safety_notes: Use dry examples in public repo.

workers.authority_max: classify memory; cannot turn memory into truth
kanban_transition_rules: memory updates wait for source and trust tier
workers.promotion_rule: hybrid because memory quality depends on context
workers.public_safety_notes: No private memory dumps.

workers.authority_max: propose skill changes and create public-safe factory improvement issues; cannot fake eval success or mutate critical factory contracts
veto_conditions: requires critical mutation without human approval
evidence_required: factory improvement issue or rejection rationale
kanban_transition_rules: closed specialists need eval-backed promotion
critical factory changes need human gate before implementation
workers.promotion_rule: closed only after repeated predictable success
workers.public_safety_notes: Skill examples and improvement issues must be public-safe and must not contain raw historical evidence.

workers.authority_max: block public leaks; cannot approve product risk
kanban_transition_rules: public artifacts wait for public-safety pass
workers.promotion_rule: closed because scan shape is deterministic
workers.public_safety_notes: This worker protects the public repo boundary.

workers.authority_max: review supply chain evidence; cannot waive release blockers
kanban_transition_rules: code/release work waits for supply-chain gate
workers.promotion_rule: hybrid; scanners closed, risk judgment supervised
workers.public_safety_notes: Reports must not expose private tokens.

workers.authority_max: review observability; cannot approve release alone
kanban_transition_rules: production promotion waits for monitoring evidence
workers.promotion_rule: hybrid because runtime signals are product-specific
workers.public_safety_notes: No private dashboards or log samples in public repo.

workers.authority_max: mirror runtime state for owner visibility; cannot change Hermes state
veto_conditions: Discord state is treated as source of truth
kanban_transition_rules: when the owner Control Tower is active, material execution waits for a fresh projection
workers.promotion_rule: closed because projection rendering is deterministic from runtime state once the mapping contract exists
workers.public_safety_notes: Use redacted runtime refs and never publish raw Discord ids, private board ids, private URLs or logs.

workers.authority_max: deliver cockpit messages and register structured responses; cannot approve gates or mutate card state directly
veto_conditions: bridge health does not follow the schema
Discord message is treated as canonical evidence
kanban_transition_rules: Discord responses are advisory until the runtime records a valid structured event
the bridge never marks ready, done, released or approved by itself
workers.promotion_rule: closed because event mapping and delivery are repeatable after private mapping and bridge health proof
workers.public_safety_notes: Keep real Discord ids, role ids, message ids, webhook URLs, private runtime ids and logs outside the public repo.
